summary: Customer Service Upgrade Workflow testing complete. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Upgrade modal, course selection, MT5 checkbox, wallet transfer checkbox all working. Fixed 3 bugs during testing: localStorage token key, course price display, wallet checkbox styling.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/students/{id}/initiate-upgrade - Creates upgrade history correctly
Backend: GET /api/students/{id}/upgrade-history - Returns complete upgrade history
Backend: Student moves to 'new_student' stage after upgrade
Backend: is_upgraded_student flag is set to true
Backend: MT5 account history tracking works
Backend: Courses API returns courses with prices
Frontend: Upgrade Modal opens from student card menu when in 'activated' stage
Frontend: Course selection dropdown shows courses with prices
Frontend: MT5 account change checkbox works
Frontend: Wallet transfer confirmation checkbox works
Frontend: Upgrade badge (↑ xN) displays on student card
Frontend: Course color-coding applied to student cards
Frontend: Success toast appears after upgrade
Frontend: Student moves to New Student column after upgrade

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: Wrong localStorage key 'token' instead of 'clt_token' causing 401 errors when fetching courses
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Changed localStorage.getItem('token') to localStorage.getItem('clt_token') in 3 places

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: Course price not displaying in dropdown (using course.price instead of course.base_price)
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Changed to (course.price || course.base_price) for price display

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: Wallet transfer checkbox section not visible in dark mode (amber-50 background)
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Changed to theme-aware colors bg-amber-500/10 and border-amber-500/30

critical_code_review_comments: Upgrade workflow correctly preserves questionnaire data via previous_questionnaire field
MT5 account history properly tracks all account changes with timestamps
is_upgraded_student flag ensures mentor metrics don't count these as new students
Student stays with same mentor after upgrade (mentor_id not cleared)
Upgrade history includes all relevant data: from/to course, amounts, timestamps, initiator
context_for_next_testing_agent: Customer Service Upgrade Workflow fully tested and working. Test student has been upgraded multiple times during testing (upgrade_count: 8). The 'Initiate Upgrade' menu option only appears when student is in 'activated' stage. Course color-coding uses getCourseColor() from UpgradeModal.jsx based on course name keywords (mastery, advanced, intermediate, basic, starter).
